summary: Current HEAD cd0919ac66ae0db8c1114f6d5acec30044d37d20 satisfies the architecture_boundary contract. The final test correction makes the PR-ship stale-review fixture explicitly strict-head-bound, so it now tests the preserved override compatibility instead of contradicting the new content-surface default. Story, Architecture, Spec, runtime policy/content binding, fail-closed behavior, and aggregate review inputs remain aligned.
inspection_summary: Independently reviewed the current review request and authorized lifecycle, all bounded aggregate handoff summaries, Story/Architecture/Spec and parent design lineage, the freshness-policy/result-binding/merge-delta implementation, content-binding build/evaluation, the amended CLI integration fixture, focused contract tests, legacy compatibility coverage, and the Story E2E matrix. The amended test passed alone at current HEAD; the current-HEAD verification artifact records the focused suite at 39/39; and the E2E matrix independently passed 8/8.

commands.command: node --test --test-name-pattern='pr ship dry-run restores Agent Review commands from explicitly strict stale role gates' test/vibepro-cli.test.js

commands.result: current-HEAD verification artifact records pass 39/39; independent run completed without an inspectable final exit summary, so the artifact is the asserted aggregate evidence

judgment_delta: Initial concern: changing the stale PR-ship fixture might merely force a pass and weaken the new default contract. Final judgment: the fixture now records gate_evidence with both --strict-head-binding and a reason, then changes HEAD and asserts the stale recovery path; it specifically proves SARF-INV-4 while other contract tests prove gate_evidence/release_risk default to content_surface.

Initial concern: an explicit strict override might bypass content binding or lose inspection/lifecycle guarantees. Final judgment: resolveReviewFreshnessPolicy requires a non-empty strict reason, buildContentBinding retains inspected surface metadata in strict_head mode, bindReviewResult stales on HEAD mismatch, and the fixture still records inspection summary/input, judgment delta, parallel-subagent provenance, and closure.

Initial concern under regression_guard: fixing one integration fixture could leave the existing content-surface, legacy merge-delta, dirty fingerprint, or fail-closed paths unverified. Final judgment: exact-current-HEAD focused evidence is 39/39, the strict fixture independently passes 1/1, and the current E2E matrix independently passes 8/8 across unchanged-surface reuse, changed-surface staleness, unresolved-diff failure, lifecycle/provenance, and strict override.

Initial concern under path_surface_coverage: the source policy, generated lineage, config/document contract, CLI recovery output, or gate artifact could diverge. Final judgment: Story/Architecture/Spec and parent design declare the same authority and rollback boundary; agent-review and content-binding preserve content_surface, legacy, and explicit strict branches; bounded aggregate inputs and current artifacts expose rather than suppress stale reasons and recovery commands.
